My Projects

mpv-music

A TUI-based music player wrapper for MPV. Originally a BASH script, it has been rewritten in Rust.

Open

TastyTabs

Mobile app built in React Native to explore and create recipes.

Open

Fitness Tracker

Mobile app built in React Native to track fitness goals and progress.

Open

WhatsApp Status Checker

A simple site with backend API that pings WhatsApp servers from different locations.

Open

Text Nom Nom

A text hungry gremlin that extracts text from PDFs-PPTs (with OCR support) + more

Open

K-Xity

System Design and UI prototype for an e-city app for uni project

Open

Local Screen Share

Local Screen Share (both udp/tcp implementations) built using Python as a university project.

Open

Temperature Converter built using Rust.

Guessing Game built using Rust.

Open

Bulky Image Converter

Open

System Design and UI prototype of a game for uni project

Open

aQracker

A simple Python script for cracking password-protected archives using 7-Zip.

Open

BBC Urdu DSA

Scrapped BBC News Urdu and used headline's titles to train ML and DL algortihms for uni project

Open

MAL AniManga DSA

Scrapped MAL and used AniManga Synopsis to train ML and DL algortihms for uni project
